general.byline: Product Developer / UX Leader / Entrepreneur in Dallas, Texas, He/Him
general.about: Multi-disciplinary product developer with 20+ years of experience spanning industrial design, UX strategy, and product management. Expert at translating user insights into commercially viable products that drive measurable business outcomes. Known for founding the VSP Innovation Lab (3D department at Marchon), delivering $10M+ in revenue growth, and achieving 10-26% sales increases across multiple brands. Passionate about innovation at the intersection of design, technology, and human behavior.

status.text: Building AI-powered solutions for team building and professional development

projects.heading: Trustybits - Hiring Manager Intelligence Tool
projects.description: AI-powered team building advisory tool that empowers hiring managers to translate team dynamics into actionable search criteria for HR. Uses Big Five and Belbin frameworks to generate three-profile candidate blueprints (Conventional, Adjacent/Transferable, High-Ceiling Wild Card). Blue ocean opportunity creating new category: 'Hiring Manager Intelligence Tools'.
projects.title: Trustybits - Hiring Manager Intelligence Tool

projects.heading: Joju - Professional OS
projects.description: LinkedIn alternative with proof-based profiles and zero-configuration portfolio generation. PromptGen workflow generates portfolios in <30 seconds with multiple style variants (Classic, Modern, Corporate). Frame as enhancement before replacement, targeting subtle converts first.
projects.title: Joju - Professional OS

projects.heading: 8825 PCMS (Persistent Context Memory Sidecar)
projects.description: LLM-agnostic portable knowledge system for maintaining consistent AI behavior across platforms. Single JSON file contains all context for any LLM (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Windsurf). Features confidence-based decision making, two-stage knowledge mining, and adaptive learning.
projects.title: 8825 PCMS

projects.heading: VSP Innovation Lab (3D Design Department)
projects.description: Founded and led the 3D design department at Marchon (later branded as VSP Innovation Lab). Revolutionized prototyping efficiency by reducing timelines and enhancing iteration speed through rapid 3D modeling and printing.
projects.title: VSP Innovation Lab

projects.heading: Nike Vision Product Line Launch
projects.description: Led launch of new Nike Vision product line targeting younger consumers. Leveraged research insights to secure stakeholder buy-in and drive market success.
projects.title: Nike Vision Product Line
metrics: 10% of company's annual growth in first year

workExperience.title: Product Manager
workExperience.description: Lead product strategy and development for B2B SaaS platform, driving operational efficiency and user-centered solutions.
achievements: Drove operational efficiency by designing automated workflows, cutting manual tasks by 55% and reducing seasonal staff reliance by 65%
Led cross-functional collaboration among development teams, clients, and stakeholders, resulting in successful project outcomes
Resolved critical user pain points through research and analysis, improving workflows and user satisfaction
Enhanced stakeholder engagement with intuitive UI prototypes using Figma and Adobe XD, driving client buy-in
Spearheaded delivery of new features for online statement processing tools, increasing usability and accessibility
Led comprehensive website redesign for non-profit division, delivering scalable, user-driven solutions

workExperience.title: Managing Partner & Design Lead
workExperience.description: Led design strategy and product development across multiple eyewear brands, driving sales growth through user-centered innovation.
achievements: Drove sales growth by 10–26% across multiple brands through user-centered product strategies
Unified cross-functional teams to deliver seamless product solutions aligned with business objectives
Uncovered and resolved critical user pain points, improving satisfaction and product adoption
Led high-impact product launches, balancing competing priorities to deliver innovative solutions
Boosted revenue growth through strategic trend analysis, positioning products for long-term success
Transformed user feedback into actionable enhancements, exceeding customer expectations

workExperience.title: Design Lead
workExperience.description: Led design strategy for Costa Del Mar eyewear collections, improving user experience and e-commerce performance.
achievements: Resolved product defects and reduced customer complaints through cross-functional collaboration
Increased website conversion rates and reduced returns by implementing user fit profiles
Established new design standards from user research insights, driving consistency
Delivered strategic project outcomes managing design agency deliverables
Elevated team performance through mentorship on vendor collaboration
Boosted user engagement by developing features informed by community feedback

workExperience.title: Senior Watch Designer
workExperience.description: Led watch design strategy and team development, delivering high-impact product launches.
achievements: Delivered 23.7% sales increase by directing strategic design for Skechers watch line launch
Spearheaded innovation through designer mentorship in vendor collaboration
Accelerated project timelines through stakeholder collaboration and workflow optimization
Drove measurable product improvements by prioritizing user needs and addressing feedback
Trained junior designers in advanced workflows, fostering skill development
Unified brand identity across watches and handbags, creating seamless customer journey
